name: SG
subtitle: Subharmonics Generator
summary: A 4 HP analog sub-harmonic generator. Feed any waveform from a VCO — saw, square, triangle, or sine — and four knobs mix in four individually divided sub-harmonics: a seventh down, a seventh an octave down, one octave down, and two octaves down. Built around a CD4013 flip-flop IC for zero-latency analog division, no microcontroller. Pairs with a mixer to blend the sub layers with the original VCO output.
